titleStmt.title: SII 34.344: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 344. Nāṅgupaṭṭi (Maḍattukkōyil), Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the west base of the Amman shrine in the Maḍattukkōyil temple.

summary.p: Vijayanagara, Rāyaṇṇa-Uḍaiyar, Vikāri, Āni, 25 = A.D. 1419, June 21.

Registers a peace compact between the ūrār of Pērāmbūr and the ūrār of Kīḻaikkurichchi by which they agreed to cease their long-standing feud, become friends hereafter, and act in unison against their common enemies. This was made in the presence of the nāṭṭavar of Teṉmalai and the ūrār of Puduvayal. An earlier compact engraved in the temple of Araṅguḷavar at Tiruvaraṅguḷam is referred to, saying that the present one is a continuation of that.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīman makāmaṇṭalīcuraṉ Emmaṇṭalamum koṇṭaruḷiya śrī vīra Irāyaṇṇa Uṭaiyar tiruirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa vikāri varuṣam Āṉi mātam 2 10 5 nāḷ pErāmpūr varantarutEvaṉ Aḻakiyār Āṉa naraciñka tEvar UḷḷiṭṭārOm
kīḻaikkuṟicci Ūravaṟkup pakai Orukkam tīntu kalveṭṭik kuṭuttapaṭi muṉpē Eṅkaḷ pēraṉār cēmanaraciñkat tēvar nāḷ mutal Aṭaikkalaṅkāttār naraciñkatēvar nāḷ Aḷavāka Uṟṟu nilai Aṟṟa viṉōtap pakaiyāy Aṅkum Iñkum nālpatu nūṟu
maṉittarum paṭṭu ciṟaimāṭum piṭittu Āṟāp pakaiyāka kiṭakkaiyil Aṭaikkalaṅkāttār naraciñkattēvar nāḷilē Ivarum mēṟpaṭi cēmarum mēṟpaṭi kumutaya nāyanārum nāṅkaḷum Eṅkaḷil porunti kīḻaikkuṟicci
Ūravarai Aḻaittu viṭṭu Uṅkaḷukkum Eṅkaḷukkum Oru Uṟṟu nilai Aṟṟa pakaikku viparītamāy Irukka vēṇṭuvatillai Eṉṟum Aṅkuppaṭṭatu Aṟutiyāka mēlpaṭṭu pērampūr kīḻaikkuṟicciyum kīḻaikuṟicci pērāmpūrumāka Oṉṟupaṭa
naṭattip pōtakkaṭavōm Eṉṟu nāṅkaḷ Araṉkuḷavar caṉṉatiyilē Aṟuti paṇṇikkuṭuttu Anta Aṟutipaṭiyilē Iṟṟai varaiyum naṭatti pōtukaiyil Iṟṟai nāḷ teṉmalai nāṭṭārum ṉūr putuvayal Ūravarum mutucoṟkuṭi nāṭṭārum
muṉpāka kalveṭṭik kuṭukkaiyil Iṉṉāḷ mutal cantiraātittavaraiyum pērampūr Aracu veṟutta Iṭam kīḻaikuṟicci veṟuttum kīḻai kuṟicci veṟutta Iṭam pērampūr Aracu veṟuttum Iraṇṭu niṉaiyāmal naṭattap pōtak kaṭavōmākavum
Iraṇṭu niṉaittōmākil Eṅkaḷ vaḻipaṭu teyvamāṉa nāyaṉār tirupperumāṉāṇṭār cīpātam tappiṉōm Āvatākavum Ippaṭikku naraciñka tēvar Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟivōm teṉ malaināṭṭavarōm Ippaṭi Aṟivōm kīraṉūr putuvayal Ūravarōm
Immariyāti Oḻintu kīḻai kuṟicci Ūravar Iraṇṭu niṉaittōm Ākil nāyaṉār Uṭaiya nāyaṉār cīpātam tappiṉōm Āvatākavum Ippaṭikku Ūṟku camaintu Ivvūr kaṇakku Uṭaiyāṉ Oṭuvāy nāṭṭu vēḷāṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 34.344 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
